_comment: DingDawg Governance — drop-in MCP config for Claude Code.
Option A (project-level): copy this object into .mcp.json at your repo root.
Option C (Claude Code CLI): claude mcp add dingdawg-governance npx dingdawg-governance
After adding, restart Claude Code. You will see two new MCP tools:
compliance_check — score against EU AI Act / CO SB 205 / NIST AI RMF / ISO 42001
No API key required for local mode.
Get a free API key at: https://dingdawg.com/developers

dingdawg-governance._comment: Core governance server — govern_action, audit_trail, compliance_check

_comment_api_key: Leave blank for local-only mode (works offline, receipts on disk).
Set to your API key for cloud-tier policy evaluation, IPFS pinning,
_comment_explain: DINGDAWG_EXPLAIN=true enables LNN causal trace in every receipt.
Shows why each policy decision was made — required for EU AI Act Art. 13
(transparency obligations). Set to false to reduce receipt verbosity.
env._comment_api_url: Override only if you are running a self-hosted DingDawg instance.

dingdawg-loop._comment: Scheduled governed agent runner — schedule_governed, loop_status, loop_receipts

env._comment_shared_key: Use the same API key as dingdawg-governance — one key covers all tools.
_comment_loop_storage: Where scheduled agent state and receipts are stored.
Change this if you want loop receipts in a shared team directory.
env._comment_concurrency: Maximum number of governed agent loops that can run simultaneously.

_usage_examples._comment: Once configured, Claude Code can call these tools directly.

arguments.action_description: Delete all records older than 90 days from the events table

arguments.system_description: Automated loan approval system using credit score, income, and employment history. Includes human oversight for decisions above $50k. Audit log enabled. Risk assessment performed quarterly.

_regulated_use_cases.healthcare_hipaa: Set context.regulation=HIPAA, risk_tier=high for PHI access. Receipts are HIPAA §164.312(b) audit logs.
_regulated_use_cases.fintech_payments: Use govern_action before any transfer_funds or charge_card action. Receipt is adverse-action documentation.
_regulated_use_cases.employment_co_sb_205: Wrap all hiring AI with risk_tier=high + context.regulation=CO_SB_205. Every decision gets a receipt for human review.
_regulated_use_cases.edtech_ferpa: Set context.data_classification=student_records. Receipts document who accessed what student data and when.
_regulated_use_cases.legal_chain_of_custody: Use receipt_id as chain-of-custody identifier. Cloud tier pins to IPFS for tamper-evident proof.
